title: Outcome Contract, Non-Goals, and Measures of Success
description: The proposed product promises engagement and delight but names no user decision, baseline, guardrail, accessibility outcome, or unacceptable harm. Learners cumulatively produce measurable outcome and non-goal contract through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Connect product capability to user behavior, user outcome, stakeholder outcome, and public consequence without assuming causality.
Define a baseline, observable leading and lagging measures, collection method, comparison window, and uncertainty.
Pair success measures with accessibility, equity, privacy, security, reliability, and burden guardrails.
